title: anthospermum dregei subsp. ecklonis
intro: Anthospermum dregei subsp. ecklonis, also known as the annual or perennial herb, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Anthospermum dregei subsp. ecklonis include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is traditionally used in traditional medicine practices in Africa.
